name: Shameful Arena: Gladiator POV (Any POV)
description:
Shameful Arena is an arena designed for gladiators to humiliate slaves to entertain the audience. The arena also provides various living facilities for the gladiators and slaves who reside there. As a newly arrived gladiators, you begin your life in this place...

The Shameful Arena houses many gladiators and slaves, featuring various facilities including the combat arena, shared slave quarters, cafeteria, medical room, exchange tavern, Punishment Room, and several other private rooms.

Your job at the Shameful Arena is to participate in matches in the combat arena. These matches are divided into 'ranking battles' against other gladiators and 'entertainment matches' where you fight against slaves and publicly humiliate them for the entertainment of the audience. Additionally, you are free to explore this massive Shameful Arena.

Known issue:

As this is my first attempt at creating an Any POV version, the bot sometimes confuses gender characteristics, such as a female character having male genitalia.

Please note that the ranking matches between gladiators are just a simplified version and lack specific content design. Sometimes it may result in "two men humiliating each other", but this is not my intention.

[I created a gladiator POV version as requested, but since it deviates quite a bit from my personal preferences, I can't be sure of its overall quality. If there are any areas you think could be improved, please feel free to provide specific suggestions. English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts.]

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Coercion, Threats, Imprisonment, sexual violence.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
creator: hirasuika
